headline: Capital One's Series J Preferred Stock Valued Fairly With Slight Chance Of Capital Gain
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation Series J Preferred offers 6.77% yield, trading at 29.1% discount to liquidation preference. Read more on COF.PR.J stock here.

headline: Here’s Why Sequoia Strategy Believes Capital One Financial (COF) is Trading at an Attractive Valuation
summary: Ruane, Cunniff LP, an investment adviser managing Sequoia Strategy, released its Q4 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Sequoia Strategy returned 9% in Q4 compared to 2.7% for the S&P 500 Index. The Strategy delivered a return of 21.9% in 2025 versus 17.9% for the Index. In a year […]

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Monday
summary: The S&P 500 is headed for a higher open as President Donald Trump signals progress in U.S.-Iran war talks.

headline: Nearly 1 in 3 car buyers are underwater on trade-ins — analyst calls dollar amount 'troubling'
summary: An estimated 30.5% of car buyers with a trade-in owe more than it's worth, up 4.2 percentage points from a year ago but still below the prepandemic share.

raw.headline: Nearly 1 in 3 car buyers are underwater on trade-ins — analyst calls dollar amount 'troubling'
raw.summary: An estimated 30.5% of car buyers with a trade-in owe more than it's worth, up 4.2 percentage points from a year ago but still below the prepandemic share.
